resources.string: Sign in to continue using Tonight.
Sign in to access your profile.
Sign in to save restaurants to your wishlist.
Sign in to view and manage your reservations.
Sign in to use QR Pay at participating restaurants.
Sign in to book a table.
Search by location, cuisine, or vibe
Date, details, preferences, and payment steps
Upcoming, visited, and canceled booking tabs
Manage, modify, and cancel reservation states
Tap to pick a gift box and reveal your extra points.
Earn base points on every booking
Free no-show forgiveness once a year
Tap one of the boxes to reveal today\'s prize.
This action permanently deletes your account and removes your profile data. This cannot be undone.
Play sounds for actions and alerts
Allow app to use your location
Show past orders on your profile
Show ads based on your activity
Your payment is secure. By confirming, you agree to our terms of service and acknowledge that your subscription will auto-renew.
Insufficient balance. Please top up first.
Please wait while we confirm your subscription
Are you sure you want to cancel your PRO subscription? You\'ll lose access to all premium features at the end of your current billing period.
Book as many tables as you want
Reservation updates, rewards, and restaurant replies will appear here.
You are all caught up. New table updates will show here first.
Read notifications stay here after you open them.
We could not complete your top up. Try again or use another method.
Your wallet activity will appear here.
Give $10, get $10. Share your code and you both earn rewards when they place their first order.
Share your code or QR with friends
They sign up and book a table
You both earn $10 in wallet rewards
Friends scan to sign up with code %1$s
Invite friends to share reservations and split bills.
When someone wants to add you, you\'ll see them here.
Blocked contacts won\'t see your activity.
A virtual envelope is on its way.
How do I cancel a reservation?
Open the booking from Dining and tap Cancel. Free cancellations are available up to 2 hours before your booking.
How do I claim my daily reward?
We typically reply within 1 business day.
Time to discover a new favorite spot.
Pending requests and confirmed reservations before you arrive.
Your completed meals with receipts, ratings, and quick rebooking.
Past cancellations and no-shows, kept here for reference.
Pending and confirmed reservations will appear here.
Your completed dining experiences will appear here.
You haven\'t cancelled any bookings. Great dining streak!
Explore restaurants and book your next experience.
The restaurant is reviewing this reservation request.
Try a new time or remove this request from your list.
The restaurant is reviewing your reservation request. You will get a notification when it is approved or rejected.
This time was not approved. You can request another time or delete the request from your dining list.
Keep this code handy. You can share it with friends so they can join the reservation.
Make a change or release the table.
Adjust guests, seating, time, or notes.
The restaurant will receive the released seat.
We will release your seat at %1$s.
Show this at the host stand when you arrive for your dinner reservation.
Present this code to check in at the restaurant.
Use a shared confirmation code to join a reservation.
This upcoming card was added to your Dining schedule.
We couldn\'t find that booking code. Check the letters and numbers.
Only active confirmed reservations can be joined by code.
Sync the latest restaurant catalog, reservations, and rewards to this device before you start browsing.
Fresh catalog indexes for nearby dining.
Availability and reservation states stay current.
Wallet and bonus data are saved locally.
Nearby venues load with sharper location clustering.
Saved menus and hours stay usable without signal.
Reminders align with your local timezone and venue rules.
Cards and Tonight Cash balances update in one pass.
Dietary notes and seating choices carry across devices.
Highlights download in smaller batches for quicker browsing.
Top picks and recent ratings refresh from the catalog.
Keep the app open while we prepare the freshest local experience.
Catalog, reservations, wallet, and rewards are now available on this device.
View only. Your server will take the order.
No receipt available for this visit.
Share this reservation with your party.
Your QR session, bill, and table actions are available here.
Confirmation %1$s is linked to this reservation.
Settle the bill from your table
Ask for help at the table
Use the table or host stand code to confirm your arrival.
Your table is ready and the restaurant has checked you in.
Your bill updates as items are added by the restaurant.
Confirm the items and choose a gratuity before payment.
Paid with Tonight Wallet. Redirecting to review.
A quick rating helps improve future recommendations.
A staff member is on their way.
